title: Gear
subtitle: Bikes, shoes and equipment you track activities with

form.title: Stats
form.description: Track the equipment you use for your activities.
form.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be 250 characters or fewer
form.nicknameTaken: You already have gear with that nickname
form.brandTooLong: Brand must be 250 characters or fewer
form.modelTooLong: Model must be 250 characters or fewer
form.saveError: Couldn't save the gear. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete gear
delete.body: Are you sure you want to delete "{nickname}"? This can't be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the gear. Please try again.

error.title: Couldn't load gear
error.description: Something went wrong while loading your gear.

empty.title: No gear yet
empty.description: Add the bikes, shoes and equipment you use to start tracking their usage.
empty.activeDescription: Add gear, or enable "Show inactive" to see inactive gear.

detail.notFoundDescription: This gear may have been deleted or doesn't belong to you.

components.title: Components
components.empty: No components yet. Add the parts you want to track wear on.
components.unsupported: This gear type doesn't track components.
components.noneActive: All components are inactive. Turn on "Show inactive" to see them.

form.description: Track the parts you replace to monitor their wear.
form.brandTooLong: Brand must be 250 characters or fewer
form.modelTooLong: Model must be 250 characters or fewer
form.retiredBeforePurchase: The retired date must be after the purchase date.
form.saveError: Couldn't save the component. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete component
delete.body: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This can't be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the component. Please try again.

error.title: Couldn't load components
error.description: Something went wrong while loading this gear's components.

activities.title: Activities
activities.empty: No activities recorded with this gear yet.

error.title: Couldn't load activities
error.description: Something went wrong while loading this gear's activities.
